Ferr-p..Chest: Anxiety in chest and region of the heart. Catarrh of the chest. Congestion of the chest. Constriction of chest and heart. Sensation of fullness. Haemorrhage of lungs. Heat.
Ferr-p..Extremities: Cold extremities. Cold hands and feet. Cold feet evening in bed. Cold feet during headache. Contraction of fingers, result of rheumatism. Cramps in thighs, legs, calve, feet.
Ferr-p..Extremities, coldness: Cold extremities. Cold hands and feet. Cold feet evening in bed. Cold feet during headache.
Ferr-p..Generalities: Great weakness, and desire to lie down. Nervous at night. Rheumatic conditions.
Ferr-p..Stomach: Appetite diminished. Ravenous appetite without relish of food. Appetite entirely gone. Aversion to food, meat, milk. Desires sour things. Distension of stomach after eating.
Ferr-p..Stomach, eructations: Eructations, after eating, better, empty, of food, foul, sour. Water-brash.
Ferr-p..Clinical: While it has been used by Schuessler's followers for the first stage of inflammatory fevers, it is useful in the higher potencies in chronic diseases, and is a deep acting anti-psoric.
Ferr-p..Heart & Circulation: Palpitation at night with anxiety, on exertion and motion, while sitting, walking rapidly.
Ferr-p..Ear: Purulent discharge from the ear. Itching in ear. Noises in the ear; roaring, buzzing, humming, ringing and singing. Catarrh of Eustachian tubes. Inflammatory pains in the ear. Otitis media. Pain deep in the ear. Drawing. Stitching. Pain and swelling of the parotid glands. Sensitive to noise. Impaired hearing.
Ferr-p..Face: Chlorotic face. Dark circles under the eyes. Earthy, pale, sallow face. Pale lips. Red face alternating with paleness. Circumscribed redness of cheeks. Red during fever; during headache. Yellow. Liver spots.
Ferr-p..Throat: Constriction of throat. Redness in throat and tonsils. Swollen tonsils. Heat in throat. Inflammation of throat and tonsils. Lumps in throat. Pain on swallowing. Burning. Soreness.
Ferr-p..Chest, lungs: Inflammation of bronchial tubes, lungs and pleura; oppression of chest.
Ferr-p..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic pain in right shoulder and upper arm, of a drawing, tearing character, aggravated by violent motion of arm, ameliorated by gentle motion (Ferr.), part sensitive to touch.
Ferr-p..Face, discoloration, pale: Earthy, pale, sallow face. Pale lips.
Ferr-p..Face, discoloration: Chlorotic face. Dark circles under the eyes. Earthy, pale, sallow face. Pale lips. Red face alternating with paleness. Circumscribed redness of cheeks. Red during fever; during headache. Yellow. Liver spots.
Ferr-p..Expectoration: Expectoration in daytime, morning, bloody, bright red, dark, copious, difficult, frothy, greenish, mucus, offensive, purulent, scanty, putrid, thick, viscid, whitish, yellow.
Ferr-p..Expectoration, bloody, spitting of blood: Expectoration in daytime, morning, bloody, bright red, dark, copious.
Ferr-p..Expectoration, bloody: Expectoration in daytime, morning, bloody, bright red, dark, copious.
Ferr-p..Chest, inflammation, bronchial tubes (br: Inflammation of bronchial tubes, lungs and pleura.
Ferr-p..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis: This is a valuable temporary remedy in the acute colds during the course of phthisis. In acute phthisis.
Ferr-p..Fever: The fever predominates. Fever at any time with inflammation of organs, joints, or mucus membranes. Fever without chill. Dry heat with thirst. Flushes of heat. Hectic fever and night sweats. Internal heat. Remittent fever. Heat after sleep.
Ferr-p..Nose: Catarrh of nose. Coryza; discharge bloody. Crusts form in the nose. Discharge excoriating, purulent.
Ferr-p..Perspiration: Perspiration in daytime, morning; clammy; with great weakness, on slight exertion, following the fever; copious; during sleep.
Ferr-p..Perspiration, clammy: Perspiration in daytime, morning; clammy; with great weakness, on slight exertion, following the fever; copious; during sleep.
Ferr-p..Chest, inflammation: Inflammation of bronchial tubes, lungs and pleura; oppression of chest.
Ferr-p..Clinical, inflammation: Fever at any time with inflammation of organs, joints, or mucus membranes.
Ferr-p..Heart & Circulation, pulse: Strong, full, frequent pulse. Strong pulsation over body, and in head.
